meta.title: Sanza — African dealflow, finally structured
meta.description: Secure data room and dealroom for African transactions.

common.tagline: The secure data room for African transactions.

home.subtitle: Secure data room for African transactions. E0 foundation — groundwork in place.

auth.brandPitch: Due diligence, Q&A, syndication and LP reporting — encrypted, watermarked, audited end to end.

signup.title: Create an account
signup.passwordHint: 8 characters min, with a letter and a digit.

notices.invalidLink: This link is no longer valid. Sign in, or request a new one.
notices.confirmedSignIn: Your address is confirmed. Sign in to continue.

verifyEmail.title: Check your email
verifyEmail.body: If this address did not already have an account, a confirmation link has just been sent: click it to activate.
verifyEmail.already: If you already had an account with this address, no email is sent — sign in directly, or reset your password if you have forgotten it.

errors.alreadyRegistered: An account already exists with this email.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Email not confirmed. Check your inbox.
errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
errors.resetLinkExpired: This link has expired. Please request a new one.
errors.passwordSameAsOld: This password is the same as your previous one. Please choose another.
errors.passwordTooWeak: Password too weak. Use at least 8 characters, with a letter and a digit.

forgot.title: Forgot your password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your address and we'll send you a link to choose a new one.
forgot.sentBody: If an account exists for this address, a reset link has just been sent. It is valid for one hour.
forgot.sentHint: Nothing received? Check your spam folder, then try again in a few minutes.
forgot.linkExpired: This link has expired or was already used. Please request a new one.
forgot.panelBody: One link, a new password, and you're back to your deals.

reset.title: New password
reset.subtitle: Choose a password you don't use anywhere else.
reset.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, with one letter and one digit.
reset.panelBody: Once saved, you'll be signed in straight away.

validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.passwordMismatch: The two passwords do not match.

onboarding.title: Create your organisation
onboarding.subtitle: Your team's workspace: deals, data rooms, members and the audit log will all be attached to it.

dashboard.meta: {date} · {deals, plural, =0 {no active deals} =1 {1 active deal} other {# active deals}}
dashboard.actionsRequired: {n, plural, =1 {1 action required} other {# actions required}}
dashboard.expiringTitle: {n, plural, =1 {1 access expires} other {# accesses expire}} within 48h
dashboard.expiringBody: Some rights are about to lapse. Extend them before access closes.
dashboard.todoEmpty: Nothing to do — all caught up.

audit.title: Audit trail
audit.subtitle: Every action is timestamped and hash-chained. Nothing can be erased.
audit.explainer: Each entry contains the fingerprint of the previous one: altering or deleting a row breaks the chain and becomes immediately detectable. The log is append-only — even an administrator cannot rewrite it.

actions.raise_moved: Raise moved to another data room

dataroom.title: Data room
dataroom.subtitle: Documents auto-indexed, encrypted and traced.
dataroom.emptyState: No deal yet. Create one: Sanza automatically generates the data room structure (Corporate, Financial, Legal, HR, IP, Compliance).
dataroom.folderAtRoot: Will be created at the root.
dataroom.noAccess: Nobody has access to this folder yet.
dataroom.auditBody: Every opening is timestamped and signed.
dataroom.selected: {n, plural, =1 {1 document selected} other {# documents selected}}
dataroom.bulkDeleteBody: {n, plural, =1 {1 document will be permanently deleted} other {# documents will be permanently deleted}}, along with all their versions. The audit log will keep a record of each deletion. This cannot be undone.
dataroom.templatesHint: Model documents to fill in. These are blank templates: they don't count as provided items.

founder.title: My documents
founder.subtitle: Your documents, encrypted and traced. You alone decide who sees them.

investor.title: Documents
investor.subtitle: The documents the founder has shared with you.

invitations.title: Invitations & NDA
invitations.subtitle: Bring an external investor in, under NDA, with limited rights.
invitations.emptyState: No deal yet. Create one from the data room to invite investors.
invitations.emailNotConfigured: No email service configured. The invitation is valid: share this link yourself.
invitations.emailFailed: The email did not go out ({error}). The invitation is still valid: share this link yourself.
invitations.ndaIntro: {org} is giving you access to the data room for the deal “{deal}”.
invitations.ndaBody: By signing, you undertake to treat all information in the “{deal}” data room of {org} as strictly confidential, to use it solely to evaluate this transaction, and not to disclose it to any third party without prior written consent. Your views are timestamped and logged.
invitations.ndaConsent: I have read and accept this confidentiality agreement. I acknowledge that this electronic signature is binding.
invitations.signatureNotice: Your signature is timestamped and tied to your identity, IP address and browser. A tamper-evident fingerprint is kept as proof.
invitations.invalidBody: This link has expired, was already used, or was revoked. Ask for a new invitation.
invitations.signInBody: This invitation to “{deal}” is addressed to {email}. Log in with that address (or create an account) to sign the NDA.
invitations.wrongAccountBody: This invitation is addressed to {invited}, but you are logged in as {current}. Log out and sign in with the right address.

founder.emptyState: No raise. Create your dossier to invite investors.

invitations.newBody: You were invited to review the “{deal}” data room. Choose a password to access it securely — your views are timestamped.
invitations.newPasswordHint: At least 8 characters, with one letter and one digit.
invitations.newExists: This address already has a Sanza account.
invitations.newWeak: Password too weak: at least 8 characters, one letter and one digit.
invitations.newGeneric: Account creation failed. Please try again shortly.
invitations.newIncomplete: Enter your name and a password of at least 8 characters.

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.subtitle: Who accesses what. Closed by default, inherited, expirable.
permissions.emptyState: No deal yet. Create one from the data room to manage its permissions.
permissions.hint: Click a level to cycle it. A right set on a folder applies to its subfolders, unless a more specific rule exists.

founder.emptyState: No raise. Create your dossier to manage access.

permissions.accessNote: Who enters this data room, with what rights. Every access is revocable and expires.
permissions.revokeConfirm: Revoke {name}’s access? They will no longer be able to open your documents.

viewer.title: Viewer
viewer.subtitle: Documents rendered page by page, spreadsheets read as a grid. The source file never leaves the server.
viewer.emptyState: No document to display. Drop one in the data room.
viewer.officeNotReadyHint: This file will soon be viewable here. In the meantime, ask the deal owner for a PDF version.
viewer.officeFailedHint: Try again shortly. If it keeps failing, let the deal owner know.
viewer.unsupportedHint: This file type cannot be previewed in the viewer.
viewer.sheetFailed: This workbook could not be read
viewer.sheetFailedHint: The file may be password-protected or corrupted. Let the deal owner know.
viewer.sheetTruncated: Showing the first {rows} rows of {total}. The rest of the workbook is not loaded.

founder.officeNotReadyHint: This file will soon be readable here. A PDF version always works.
founder.officeFailedHint: Try again shortly. If it keeps failing, write to us.
founder.sheetFailedHint: The file may be password-protected or corrupted.

investor.officeNotReadyHint: This file will soon be readable here. Meanwhile, ask the founder for a PDF.
investor.officeFailedHint: Try again shortly. If it keeps failing, let the founder know.
investor.sheetFailedHint: The file may be password-protected or corrupted. Let the founder know.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Protect your account and access to data rooms.

twoFactor.enabledHint: An authentication code is required at every login.
twoFactor.disabledHint: Add a layer of security with one-time codes.
twoFactor.scanHint: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy…), then enter the 6-digit code.
twoFactor.challengeSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.

password.rule2: At least one letter and one digit
password.rule3: Enforced at signup and password change

roadmap.title: What exists, what's coming
roadmap.subtitle: Sanza is at V0: the secure core works, the rest is being built. This page says honestly where we stand — and lets you weigh in on what comes next.
roadmap.intro: Vote for what matters most to you. Votes decide the build order, not our hunches.
roadmap.plannedHint: Sorted by votes — the most requested ships first.
roadmap.shippedHint: Testable right now in the app.
roadmap.suggestDescPlaceholder: Describe the problem it solves in your work.
roadmap.disclaimer: Timelines are indicative and may shift: they depend on your feedback. Sanza is built by a small team — we prefer announcing little and shipping, over promising broadly.

pipeline.title: Pipeline
pipeline.subtitle: Move your deals from one stage to the next. Every change is audited.
pipeline.emptyState: No deal yet. Create one to start your pipeline.
pipeline.hint: Drag a card between columns, or use the selector at the bottom of each card.

deal.title: Deal sheet
deal.subtitle: Edit the deal, track its progress and open its data room.
deal.emptyState: No deal yet. Create one from the pipeline or the data room.
deal.name: Deal name
deal.readinessHint: Share of checklist documents provided. Computed automatically: attach a proof and the score rises.
deal.notePlaceholder: Point of attention, recommendation for the committee…
deal.tipReadiness: Share of expected documents provided. The higher it is, the fewer surprises due diligence will hold.
deal.tipNextMilestone: The deal's next dated step (committee, closing…). Manage them in the Milestones section.
deal.tipIcNotes: Internal investment-committee notes. Never visible to invited investors.
deal.tipTeam: The internal members of your organization working on this deal.
deal.tipHistory: Log of actions on this deal, drawn from the tamper-proof audit trail.
deal.deleteBody: “{name}” and its entire data room (folders, documents, permissions, invitations) will be permanently deleted. The audit log will keep the record of this deletion. This cannot be undone.

founder.title: My raise
founder.subtitle: The amount sought, your progress and your documents.
founder.name: Raise name

versions.title: Versions
versions.subtitle: Full document history. Nothing is overwritten.
versions.noDocs: No documents in this data room.
versions.keepAll: Every version is kept: knowing what was shown to an investor, and when, is part of the proof.

nda.title: Signed agreements
nda.subtitle: Signed NDAs with their proof. Available at any time.
nda.proofNote: This fingerprint seals the signer's identity, the agreement's content, the timestamp and the connection origin. Any alteration would invalidate it.
nda.proofLine: Each guest signs before accessing documents. The proof — timestamp, IP, document fingerprint — stays attached to the person and cannot be changed.

checklist.title: DD checklist
checklist.subtitle: The documents an investor or a DFI will require. Dossier completeness follows from it.
checklist.noItems: The checklist has not been applied to this deal yet.

categoryHints.ohada: Legal existence and governance. No closing is possible without these.
categoryHints.financier: Accounts and tax. This is where valuation is decided.
categoryHints.dfi: What a development finance institution will require before any disbursement.

checklist.scoreExplainer: The score is not entered: it is recomputed on every status change. An item 'in progress' counts as half — it isn't nothing, but it isn't a delivered document either.

readiness.title: Dossier completeness
readiness.subtitle: Is your data room ready to be shown?
readiness.verdictReady: Your data room is presentable. Remaining items can be handled during due diligence.
readiness.verdictAlmost: Structural items are still missing. Complete them before opening the room to an investor.
readiness.verdictEarly: Too many items are missing. Opening the room now would make a poor first impression.
readiness.todoTitle: {n, plural, =1 {1 item to handle} other {# items to handle}}
readiness.allDoneBody: All expected items are provided. Your data room is complete.

qa.title: Q&A
qa.subtitleInternal: Investor questions. Nothing is visible until published.
qa.subtitleGuest: Ask the team your questions. You'll see answers once published.
qa.questionPlaceholder: E.g. what is the revenue concentration across the top 3 clients?
qa.askNote: Your question goes to the team. They will draft an answer, have it reviewed internally, then publish it.
qa.answerPlaceholder: Draft the answer. It stays invisible to the investor until published.

tips.dashboard: An overview of your activity: active deals, tasks to handle and the team's latest actions.
tips.pipeline: Your deals arranged by stage, from sourcing to closing. Drag a card to move it forward.
tips.stage: The deal's stage in your investment process: Sourcing, Screening, Due diligence, Committee, Signed, Passed.
tips.deal: The dossier sheet: amount, completeness, milestones, team, internal notes and history.
tips.dataRoom: The deal's document space: folders, files, versions and access rights, all traced.
tips.viewer: Read documents page by page, watermarked on the fly. The source file never leaves the server.
tips.watermark: The watermark (viewer's email + date) is baked into the page image: impossible to remove, it deters leaks.
tips.downloadBlocked: Depending on the access level, downloading the original file is blocked — only watermarked reading is allowed.
tips.permissions: Who accesses what, folder by folder. Closed by default, inherited from parent folders, with optional expiry.
tips.permLevels: From most restricted to broadest: None, Watermarked, View, Download, Edit.
tips.invitations: Bring an external investor in, under NDA, with limited rights and an expiry date.
tips.nda: A confidentiality agreement e-signed before any access. Its signing is timestamped and logged as proof.
tips.ndaProof: Proof of signature: identity, date, IP address and a fingerprint of the signed text — enforceable in a dispute.
tips.versions: Each document's version history. Every upload creates a new version without overwriting the previous one.
tips.audit: A tamper-proof log of every action. Each entry is timestamped and hash-chained to the previous one.
tips.auditChain: Entries are linked by hash: altering or deleting a line would break the chain, which is detectable.
tips.checklist: The documents an investor will require. Attaching the document that proves an item validates it and raises completeness.
tips.readiness: Share of expected documents provided. The higher it is, the more complete the dossier.
tips.qa: Investors' questions and your answers. An answer is only visible once published.
tips.security: Protect your account: two-factor authentication and password policy.
tips.twoFactor: A second code, on top of your password, at every sign-in — via an authenticator app.
tips.roadmap: What's left to build, and when. Your testers can suggest and vote on features.
tips.sheetMode: Spreadsheets are read as a grid rather than rendered as an image, so a financial model stays readable and scrollable. Only values are sent — never formulas, nor the file itself.

founderHome.subtitle: Your raise “{deal}”, at a glance.
founderHome.viewsEmpty: No one has opened your documents yet. Your invitees' views will appear here.
founderHome.coverageHint: The ring shows how much of the document was opened.
founderHome.subtitleV5: Where your raise stands, and who's reading your documents.
founderHome.signalBody: {who} viewed {docs} of your documents ({time} reading). Strong interest — reach out.
founderHome.subtitleDiligence: Where your data room stands, and who's reading your documents.
